description:
As a building owner
  I want to manage my rental buildings
  So that I can organize my property portfolio

steps.name: I am logged in as an owner
I am viewing the buildings page
I click the "Thêm tòa nhà" button
I fill in the building form with:
I submit the building form
I should see a success message "Tòa nhà đã tạo"
the building "Tòa nhà Sunrise" should appear in the building list
I am logged in as an owner
I am viewing the buildings page
I click on building "Tòa nhà A"
I click the "Sửa" button
I change the building name to "Tòa nhà A - Premium"
I submit the building form
I should see "Tòa nhà A - Premium"
